source: https://www.gov.uk/eta/apply, https://www.gov.uk/guidance/using-the-uk-eta-app, and https://www.gov.uk/guidance/immigration-rules/immigration-rules-appendix-electronic-travel-authorisation; re-checked 2026-07-14. GOV.UK confirms the passport, email, address, job, other-nationality, criminal-conviction, and conditional parental-contact steps. Passport photo, chip scan, face scan, and face photo are non-text steps and are excluded from this checker. The Home Office publishes no fixed passport-number or text-length limits for ETA, so this local checker uses broad conservative limits rather than presenting them as official.

passport.label: Passport number
passport.help: Copy the number from the passport you will use to travel. The app also photographs the passport and may scan its chip; the online route requires a passport photo.

errors.tooShort: Enter the passport number printed on the photo page
errors.tooLong: Check the passport number — this local checker allows up to 20 characters
errors.invalidFormat: Use the letters and numbers printed as the passport number

full_name.label: Full name
full_name.help: Use every family and given name shown on the passport. Check any details read from the passport photo or chip before continuing.

errors.tooShort: Enter the name shown on the passport
errors.tooLong: Check the passport spelling — this local checker allows up to 100 characters

date_of_birth.label: Date of birth
date_of_birth.help: Use YYYY-MM-DD in this local checker. Match the date shown on the passport.

errors.tooLate: Date of birth cannot be after 2026-07-14

email.label: Email
email.help: Use an inbox you control. The Home Office sends submission and decision emails, including the 16-digit ETA reference number.

errors.tooLong: Email is too long — max 254 characters in this checker

home_address.label: Home address
home_address.help: Enter your current address. GOV.UK lists address questions in the ETA application.

job.label: Job
job.help: Answer the job questions with your current situation. Do not invent an employer if you are unemployed, retired, or studying.

other_nationalities.label: Other nationalities
other_nationalities.help: Answer whether you hold any other nationality. If Yes, provide each nationality requested by the official form.

errors.required: Answer whether you have any other nationality

criminal_convictions.label: Criminal convictions
criminal_convictions.help: Answer truthfully. If Yes, GOV.UK asks for the offence, conviction date, and sentence in as much detail as possible.

parent_contact.label: Parent or guardian contact
parent_contact.help: Required only when the applicant is under 18. GOV.UK asks for contact details for someone with parental responsibility. Every applicant, including a child, also needs a face photo; applicants aged 10 or over using the app need a face scan.

errors.required: Enter the parent or guardian contact details for an applicant under 18
